zh.Newbold, Nottinghamshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold於1165年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Paganus de Villiers33歲，母親Emma De Payne20歲。他和Beatrice Newman至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Newbold, Nottinghamshire, England, Unite: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold于1165年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Paganus de Villiers33岁，母亲Emma De Payne20岁。他和Beatrice Newman至少有1个儿子。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Villiers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Villiers, the name of several places in France, all named from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’ (see Villars ). Compare Devilliers .

variants.name: Villars
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri.

French: habitational name from any of various places called Villars, from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’, a derivative of Latin villa ‘country house, estate’ (later used of a group of houses forming a settlement).

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Newbold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Midlands): habitational name from one or more of the many places so called, especially Newbold in Derbyshire, derived from Old English nīwe ‘new’ + bōthl, bōtl, bold ‘dwelling, house’. Possibly also from places whose name derives from the same Old English elements in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lancashire, Leicestershire, Northamptonshire, Nottinghamshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and the East Yorkshire.

en.lifeSummary: When Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold was born in 1165, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Paganus de Villiers, was 33 and his mother, Emma De Payne, was 20. He had at least 1 son with Beatrice Newman. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold est né en 1165, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Paganus de Villiers, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Emma De Payne, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Beatrice Newman. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold 1165 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Paganus de Villiers 33 und seine Mutter Emma De Payne 20. Er hatte mit Beatrice Newman mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold è nato il nel 1165 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Paganus de Villiers, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Emma De Payne, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Beatrice Newman. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Newbold, Nottinghamshire, England, Unite: イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newboldが1165年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Paganus de Villiersは33歳，母Emma De Payneは20歳であった。彼はBeatrice Newmanとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold(이)가 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Paganus de Villiers(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma De Payne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Beatrice Newman(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold nasceu em 1165, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Paganus de Villiers, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Emma De Payne, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Beatrice Newman. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold родился в 1165 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Paganus de Villiers было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Emma De Payne, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Beatrice Newman. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Paganus de Villiers - Lord of Newbold nació en 1165, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Paganus de Villiers, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Emma De Payne, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Beatrice Newman. Murió en su pueblo.
